title: pilosella bauhini subsp. fastigiata
intro: Pilosella bauhini subsp. fastigiata, also known as a subspecies of the Pilosella bauhini plant, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and protecting against oxidative stress. Pilosella bauhini subsp. fastigiata is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
